summary: 3 film announcements, 7 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Toto the Ninja Cat
film.talent: Based on books by Dermot O'Leary
film.announcement: Animated series in development based on Dermot O'Leary's children's book series.

film.title: Dave the Diver
film.announcement: Live-action adaptation of Mintrocket's hit game in development with director Anthony C. Ferrante attached.

film.title: The Lost Children of Tuam
film.announcement: Feature film produced by Liam Neeson set to world premiere at Galway Film Fleadh.

tv.title: Survivor Animated Comedy
tv.announcement: Animated comedy series set in an animal kingdom based on the Survivor format in development at Paramount Animation.

tv.title: World Cup Uncensored
tv.announcement: Spin-off series from Piers Morgan's uncensored content heading to Paramount's 5 streaming platform.

tv.title: The Royals Uncensored
tv.announcement: Spin-off series from Piers Morgan's uncensored content heading to Paramount's 5 streaming platform.

tv.title: Knicks Documentary Series
tv.announcement: Documentary series following the New York Knicks' NBA championship victory announced by Ben Stiller in partnership with A24 and HBO.

tv.title: Belzebubs
tv.announcement: Heavy metal satire animated series picked up by Banijay Kids & Family with voice cast and first clip released.

tv.title: Bock Saga
tv.announcement: True crime series about cults, eccentric characters and treasure with Limonero Films and Parad Media handling worldwide sales.

tv.title: Dancing With the Stars Season 35
tv.announcement: Guillermo Rodriguez, right-hand man to Jimmy Kimmel, added to the celebrity cast for Season 35.
